title: Eight O'Clock Walk
writer: Jack Roffey, Gordon Harboard, Katherine Strueby
actors: Richard Attenborough, Cathy O'Donnell, Derek Farr
plot: In post-WW2 England, a taxi driver is ostracized by society after he's accused of murdering a school-girl and his untried lawyer must find the real killer to save his client from the hangman.
